data.title: ASUS makes 11th appearance on Fortune's 2026 World's Most Admired Companies list, focusing on innovation and product excellence.
data.description: For the 11th consecutive year, ASUS has been selected for Fortune's 2026 World’s Most Admired Companies List. This recognition underscores ASUS's commitment to innovation, responsibility, and product excellence. This achievement showcases ASUS's enduring reputation and standing in the global business landscape.

data.title: Alico, Inc. will announce Q1 2026 financial results on Feb 4, 2026 after market close. Nasdaq: ALCO.
data.description: Alico, Inc. revealed today in Fort Myers, Florida, that they will be unveiling their financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 4, 2026, post-market closure. The Company, identified as Alico (Nasdaq: ALCO), is set to disclose these figures then.

data.title: GCL Global Holdings Ltd. plans a conference call on Jan 30, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. EST to review its first half fiscal year 2026 results.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, GCL Global Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: GCL), a prominent games and entertainment company based in Singapore, revealed plans for a conference call to review its financial performance for the first half of fiscal year 2026. The call is scheduled for January 30, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. EST. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's progress and financial figures.

data.title: Lexicon Pharmaceuticals celebrates 30th anniversary by ringing Nasdaq bell on January 27, 2026.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Lexicon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. stated that they will be ringing the Nasdaq Stock Market Closing Bell on January 27, 2026. Lexicon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LXRX.

data.title: C3is Inc. (NASDAQ: CISS) to expand fleet with 2 MR product tankers by Q1-Q3 2026. Estimated Net Asset Value as of Sep 30, 2025, disclosed.
data.description: In Athens, Greece, C3is Inc. (NASDAQ: CISS), a ship-owning firm specializing in dry bulk and tanker seaborne transportation, revealed its fleet expansion plans. The company anticipates the delivery of two MR product tankers in 2026, slated between Q1 and Q3. Additionally, management disclosed the estimated Net Asset Value (NAV) of the Company as of September 30, 2025.

data.title: Planet Fitness ranked 16th overall among 500 brands in Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500® ranking, with more members than any other fitness brand.
data.description: Planet Fitness, based in Hampton, New Hampshire, was recently ranked as the 16th top brand among 500 by a leading organization. The company is known for being one of the largest and rapidly expanding franchisors and operators of fitness centers. With a significant number of members, Planet Fitness stands out as a top choice in the fitness industry.

data.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) announced the tax treatment of 2025 distributions for stockholders.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in Pasadena, California, Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) disclosed the tax treatment details of its distributions in 2025. Stockholders should refer to the provided chart for specifics. It is advised that they seek guidance from their tax advisors for personalized tax advice.

data.title: Insilico Medicine gets FDA approval for ISM8969, NLRP3 inhibitor. Phase I trial in US to assess safety, tolerability.
data.description: Approval of the Investigational New Drug (IND) by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has opened the door for the ISM8969 clinical trial in the United States. This Phase I study is set to assess the safety, tolerability, and pharmacokinetics of ISM8969, a new oral therapeutic. The approval marks an important milestone, allowing the trial to move forward and potentially benefit patients.

data.title: Standex (NYSE: SXI) to reveal Q2 2026 results on Jan. 29, 2026. Conference call at 8:30 am ET.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Standex International Corporation (NYSE: SXI) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on January 29, 2026, following the market's closure. The conference call to discuss these results will be live streamed on the internet at 8:30 a.m. ET. Standex International Corporation is a publicly traded company listed under NYSE with a focus on diverse industries.

data.title: Revolut abandons takeover plans, aims for US banking license with OCC after considering branch commitments for a potential acquisition.
data.description: Revolut is said to be seeking a US banking license from the OCC after originally contemplating acquiring a bank, which might have necessitated branch commitments.

data.title: DCX Liquid Cooling Systems introduces new 8MW Coolant Distribution Unit, optimized for 45°C warm-water cooling in next-gen NVIDIA AI deployments.
data.description: DCX Liquid Cooling Systems in Warsaw, Poland has introduced the second generation Facility Distribution Unit (FDU V2AT2), catering to the increasing demand for AI deployments. The new CDU is capable of accommodating 45°C warm-water cooling for NVIDIA's NVL72 GB200 / GB300 Blackwell and Vera Rubin architectures. The FDU V2AT2 can handle up to 8.15MW of heat transfer capacity and boasts a remarkable flowrate, allowing operation at 45°C warm-water temperature.

data.title: Iceland data center colocation market valued at USD 170M in 2024, set to reach USD 375M by 2030 - growing at CAGR of 14.09%.
data.description: A recent report on the Iceland Data Center Colocation Market has been released, indicating its valuation at USD 170 million in 2024 and a projected increase to USD 375 million by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.09%. Currently, there are seven operational colocation data centers in Iceland, as of December 2024. It is anticipated that this number will continue to rise in the future due to increasing demand and expansion efforts within the industry.

data.title: CANEUS International partners with Maharashtra, India to establish global innovation institute at WEF Davos.
data.description: Announcement from DAVOS, Switzerland on January 23, 2026: The establishment of the world's premier Global Mid-TRL Innovation Acceleration and Skilling Institute focusing on aerospace, space, energy, and deep technology has been revealed. CANEUS International, in collaboration with the Government of Maharashtra (India), unveiled this initiative. The institute is set to be a pioneering force in nurturing innovation with a global reach.

data.title: Binance applies for MiCA license in Greece before July 1 EU deadline, with fast-track process reported post holding company setup there.
data.description: Binance has reportedly accelerated its application for the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) after forming a holding company in Greece last December. The move aims to expedite the approval process for MiCA, reflecting Binance's strategic approach to regulatory compliance.
VIOLENCE AGAINST PROTESTERS IS DEADLIEST CRACKDOWN SINCE 1979 IRANIAN REVOLUTION, SAYS UN FACT FINDING MISSION

data.title: Province of Córdoba to offer cash for its U.S. Dollar Step-Up Notes due 2027, announced today, per PRNewswire.
data.description: In Cordoba, Argentina, on January 23, 2026, the Province of Córdoba initiated a cash purchase offer for the outstanding shares. This offer is open to all registered holders or beneficial owners, collectively termed as "Holders." The Province is targeting a specific number of shares for this buyout.

data.title: Trump's lawsuit against JPMorgan and CEO Dimon sends a strong message to Corporate America.
data.description: The legal actions taken by the president against a prominent Wall Street firm and its CEO, Jamie Dimon, have created a sense of unease within Corporate America. The significant impact of these efforts is resonating throughout the business community, raising concerns and causing tremors within the financial sector. The president's actions have underscored the increasing scrutiny and challenges faced by major corporations, highlighting the need for heightened vigilance and compliance within the industry. The legal battles involving the president, the Wall Street giant, and its CEO have captured the attention of many, signaling a potential shift in the relationship between the government and Corporate America. This development has sparked conversations about accountability, regulation, and the responsibilities of key players in the business world.

data.title: Acrivon Therapeutics to present Phase 2b study data on ACR-368 for endometrial cancer at ESGO Congress by Dr. Konstantinopoulos.
data.description: Renowned expert Dr. Panagiotis Konstantinopoulos from Dana-Farber Cancer Institute will present recent interim clinical findings from a Phase 2b study of ACR-368 in patients with endometrial cancer. The study is focused on obtaining registration.
